scripts.build: npm run build --workspace @flowos/shared && npm run build --workspace @flowos/db && npm run build --workspace @flowos/electron && npm run build --workspace @flowos/renderer && npm run build --workspace @flowos/extension-chrome && npm run build --workspace @flowos/extension-vscode
scripts.test:window-editor: npm run build:swift-helper && npm run test:window-editor --workspace @flowos/electron
scripts.typecheck: npm run build --workspace @flowos/shared && npm run build --workspace @flowos/db && npm run typecheck --workspace @flowos/electron && npm run typecheck --workspace @flowos/renderer && npm run typecheck --workspace @flowos/extension-chrome && npm run typecheck --workspace @flowos/extension-vscode && npm run typecheck --workspace @flowos/shared && npm run typecheck --workspace @flowos/db
